## Summary

- What changed and why?

## Type of change

- [ ] test
- [ ] fix
- [ ] feature
- [ ] refactor
- [ ] docs
- [ ] ci

## Validation

- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] `npx playwright test --grep "@smoke"`
- [ ] `npx tsc --noEmit`
- [ ] Attached report/logs/screenshots if relevant

## Tag Policy Check

- [ ] New tests include at least one required tag (`@smoke` or `@regression`)
- [ ] Optional scope tags added where useful (`@ui`, `@api`, `@contract`)

## Risk and rollback

- Risk level: low / medium / high
- Rollback plan:

Closes #
